detection_trigger: Massive WebSocket reconnection storm with no successful handshake completion

failure_characteristics.primary_symptom: WebSocket reconnection every 3 seconds with thousands of failed attempts
secondary_symptoms: Socket.IO handshake succeeds initially but WebSocket upgrade fails
Connection disconnects when terminal streaming is activated
Transport errors and disconnections flood the logs

failure_sequence.evidence: WebSocket connections flood server but never complete

issues.issue: terminalStreamingServiceInstance declared but not initialized until line 432
AdvancedTerminalStreamingService initialized inside WebSocket enabled block
issues.impact: Initialization happens too late in server lifecycle

issues.issue: /terminal namespace created but isolated from streaming service
issues.impact: Namespace conflicts and connection routing failures

issues.issue: Terminal data broadcasting depends on claude-instance-manager events
issues.impact: Event chain breaks when PTY data flow is interrupted

issues.issue: StartStreaming method has complex dependency chain on claude-instance-manager
issues.impact: Any failure in dependency chain breaks entire streaming

initialization_order.problem: Terminal services initialized after WebSocket handlers that reference them

namespace_conflicts.solution_required: Consolidate to single namespace with unified routing

dependency_fragility.problem: Terminal streaming depends on complex chain: Socket.IO -> claude-instance-manager -> PTY -> terminal output
dependency_fragility.solution_required: Add resilience and fallback mechanisms at each stage

error_propagation.problem: Single failure point cascades to complete WebSocket connection failure

impact_assessment.system_impact: HIGH - WebSocket reconnection storms consume server resources
impact_assessment.data_impact: LOW - No data loss, but no terminal output received

nld_classification.predictability: HIGH - Consistent failure pattern on terminal activation
nld_classification.detection_difficulty: MEDIUM - Clear error signatures in logs
nld_classification.debugging_complexity: HIGH - Requires understanding full WebSocket/PTY chain

tdd_prevention_recommendations.description: Test that terminalStreamingServiceInstance is initialized before any WebSocket handlers reference it
Test that /terminal and /terminal-streaming namespaces don't conflict
Test complete flow from WebSocket connect -> PTY creation -> terminal output
Test WebSocket reconnection limits and circuit breaker behavior
Test terminal streaming resilience when claude-instance-manager fails

immediate_fixes_required.description: Move terminalStreamingServiceInstance initialization before WebSocket setup
Add null checks and error boundaries for terminalStreamingServiceInstance

pattern_metadata.detection_method: Log pattern analysis + Code structure review
pattern_metadata.pattern_uniqueness: Medium - Similar to other initialization order issues
pattern_metadata.learning_value: HIGH - Critical for WebSocket service architecture
